_comment: Import via Settings -> Rules -> Rulesets -> New ruleset -> Import a ruleset. Defense-in-depth ruleset that blocks pushes touching governance, CI, license, lockfile, and Android build configuration paths from anyone NOT in the bypass list. Scoped to main/master only so the Copilot coding agent and Dependabot can still freely modify these files on their own feature branches; the protection bites at merge time, when the merging actor must be in the bypass list (i.e. the repo owner/admin or an authorized GitHub App). Note: the `file_path_restriction` rule type requires a paid plan on some account tiers. If your account does not support file_path_restriction, you can delete this ruleset; CODEOWNERS plus the default-branch ruleset still require owner review on these paths.
name: Protect workflows, license, and config files

bypass_actors._comment: Replace -1 with the GitHub App ID for github-actions[bot] (release-bump.yml edits package.json + android/app/build.gradle and pushes directly to main; without this entry the release workflow will fail).
Replace -1 with the GitHub App ID for the Copilot coding agent (copilot-swe-agent[bot]). Only needed if you ever let the agent merge its own PRs; otherwise remove.

Replace -1 with the GitHub App ID for dependabot[bot]. `pull_request` bypass mode lets Dependabot's auto-PRs touch package.json / package-lock.json without being blocked by file_path_restriction at PR creation time. Final merge still requires owner approval (CODEOWNERS).
